event: Still Life with Cat and Fish
description: A dark-toned still life depicting a calico cat crouching on a stone ledge beside a large flat fish on a plate. Two slender fish hang vertically from a hook above. A small brown mortar and pestle sits at the right, and an onion with a green shoot lies on the ledge. The background is very dark, with the forms emerging from shadow in warm, muted tones. The cat gazes alertly at the viewer while positioned protectively near the fish.

_meta.title: Still Life with Cat and Fish
